title: 无标题文章
summary: in an effort to prove that i'm not just an AI tip dispensing bot, here's a palate cleanser of one my (& the 90s') all time favorite songs, from a podcast that does some of the best song breakdowns: https:// songexploder.net/goo-goo-dolls
content:
in an effort to prove that i'm not just an AI tip dispensing bot, here's a palate cleanser of one my (& the 90s') all time favorite songs, from a podcast that does some of the best song breakdowns:

https://songexploder.net/goo-goo-dolls
